payload.label: outlet
payload.long_description: White plastic duplex outlet cover plate with two vertical rectangular sockets and a visible central screw, wall-mounted and slightly tilted in the crop; surface shows light gray smudges and the image is low-resolution/blurred — estimated distance ≈0.6 m from camera.
